title: Fabricated assault allegation against Lithuanian defence minister
description: A false article was published through compromised TV3.lt administrator accounts and distributed to government and media recipients by spoofed email. A malicious DDE document downloaded a PowerShell payload from an actor-controlled server.

title: Fabricated corruption allegation against Lithuanian defence minister
description: Spoofed ministry emails and compromised news sites disseminated a false corruption narrative. Email headers exposed the distribution server, while a planted backdoor was used to replace legitimate news content.

title: Polskie Radio newsletter lure delivering RADIOSTAR
description: A phishing email impersonated a Polish radio newsletter and linked to a malicious document. The document reused a DDE execution flow, Russian-language error text, and command-and-control infrastructure seen in an earlier Lithuanian case.

title: Gift-themed lure delivering VIDEOKILLER
description: A gift-themed malicious document used a PowerShell download chain and delivered a .NET backdoor. The operation shared execution conventions and encoded command-and-control behavior with the malware cluster documented in the technical annex, but exposed a different server.

title: SOCIS press-release lure delivering a backdoor
description: A phishing message spoofed a Ukrainian polling organisation and delivered a weaponised presentation. The sending server had previously appeared in credential-harvesting activity and in dissemination of a fabricated Lithuanian corruption story.
